verdict: Reading passes all hard checks; two soft findings noted — sidecar field names diverge from skill spec (non-blocking) and word-count sits at the low end of the reading-time target at 230 wpm.

format_discipline.meta_sidecar_notes: Sidecar parses and contains word_count/reading_minutes/citations, but field names differ from skill spec: 'reading_minutes' vs expected 'estimated_read_minutes', 'citations' vs expected 'citations_used', and 'sections' field is absent. Soft finding only — sidecar is parseable and substantively complete.

findings.detail: Sidecar uses 'reading_minutes' (expected 'estimated_read_minutes'), 'citations' (expected 'citations_used'), and omits 'sections' array entirely.

length.notes: At the skill-specified 230 wpm, 1246 words = 5.4 min, just below the 6-min floor. At 200 wpm (sidecar's implied rate) = 6.2 min, within range. Word count is within [1200, 1600] and the shortfall is marginal (~36 words to reach 6 min at 230 wpm). Flagged as a soft finding; not treated as a hard fail given the word count is within spec.

findings.detail: 1246 words / 230 wpm = 5.4 min, 0.6 min below the 6-min floor. Word count is within range; adding ~36 words anywhere would resolve this.

forward_concepts_named_and_deferred.treatment: Named and explicitly deferred: 'You will study joint probability in more depth in later topics; for now, think of it as the probability of the overlap.' Acceptable per skill rules.

sample.assertion: Conditional probability captures how likelihood of one event changes once you know something else has happened
P(A|B) notation with rain/dark-clouds and late/traffic-jam examples
P(A|B) and P(B|A) are different questions
Die example: condition >3 reduces space to {4,5,6}, P(even|>3)=2/3
Formula P(A|B) = P(A and B) / P(B)
LLM next-token selection as conditional probability

all_findings.detail: Sidecar field 'reading_minutes' should be 'estimated_read_minutes'; 'citations' should be 'citations_used'; 'sections' array is missing. Sidecar is parseable and substantively complete — does not block pass.
1246 words at 230 wpm = 5.4 min, 0.6 min below the 6-min floor of the [6, 8] range. Word count (1246) is within [1200, 1600]. Adding ~36 words resolves this.
